guide: Chi chinh file nay neu ban muon doi ROI/line.
Neu sua sai JSON hoac sai cau truc, app se bo qua file nay va quay ve counting_lines.json.
ROI can it nhat 3 diem. Moi diem co dang [x, y].
De chinh rieng ben trai, chi sua 2 diem dau-cuoi phia trai trong ROI.
Ben phai dang kha khit, nen han che sua 2 diem phia phai neu khong can.
Line display mode hien tai duoc dieu khien trong .env qua COUNTING_LINE_MODE=soft|outline|hidden.
